# openai_projects (Data Source)

List organization projects.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "openai_projects" "example" {
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Synthetic data source identifier.
- `projects` (Attributes List) Projects returned by the API. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))
- `response_json` (String) Raw JSON response returned by the OpenAI API.

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `archived_at` (Number) archived at
- `created_at` (Number) created at
- `external_key_id` (String) external key id
- `id` (String) id
- `name` (String) name
- `status` (String) status
